name: Peach and Raspberry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Peel and slice the peaches.
3. Combine the peaches with 3/4 cup of sugar, cornstarch, and lemon juice.
4. Gently stir in the raspberries.
5. Transfer the mixture to a 2-quart baking dish and cover with foil.
6. Bake until juices are bubbling, about 30 minutes.
7. In a separate bowl, combine 1/4 cup sugar, flour, baking powder, and salt.
8. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
9. Stir milk into the flour mixture until the ingredients just hold together.
10. Drop eight heaping spoonfuls of dough onto hot fruit and sprinkle remaining sugar on dough.
11. Bake uncovered until biscuits have browned, about 25 minutes.
